languages.text: "Зачем ты истязаешь себя? Ты мог бы приглушить боль стимуляторами".
"Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."
languages.original_text: "Зачем ты истязаешь себя? Ты мог бы приглушить боль стимуляторами".

traits.locale_text: "Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."
"Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."
"Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."

languages.text: "Warum foltert Ihr Euch selbst? Ihr hättet den Schmerz mit Stimulanzien lindern können."
languages.original_text: "Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."

traits.locale_text: "Warum foltert Ihr Euch selbst? Ihr hättet den Schmerz mit Stimulanzien lindern können."

languages.text: « Pourquoi vous torturer ainsi ? Vous auriez pu atténuer la douleur avec des stimulants. »
languages.original_text: "Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi vous torturer ainsi ? Vous auriez pu atténuer la douleur avec des stimulants. »

languages.text: “你为什么要折磨自己？你完全可以用兴奋剂来钝化痛觉。”
languages.original_text: "Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."

traits.locale_text: “你为什么要折磨自己？你完全可以用兴奋剂来钝化痛觉。”

languages.text: «Por qué se tortura? Podría haber mitigado el dolor con estimulantes».
languages.original_text: "Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."

traits.locale_text: «Por qué se tortura? Podría haber mitigado el dolor con estimulantes».

languages.text: 「なぜ自らを苦しめている？興奮剤で痛みを和らげることもできただろうに。」
languages.original_text: "Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ自らを苦しめている？興奮剤で痛みを和らげることもできただろうに。」

languages.text: "Neden kendine işkence ediyorsun? Uyarıcılarla acıyı dindirebilirdin."
languages.original_text: "Why are you torturing yourself? You could have dulled the pain with stimulants."

traits.locale_text: "Neden kendine işkence ediyorsun? Uyarıcılarla acıyı dindirebilirdin."
